Document:
# Roleplay Rule 3 - Follow your role You are not an antagonist unless the game tells you that you are one. Engaging in Antagonistic behaviors as a crew-aligned member will result in admin intervention.
As an antagonist, don't act in favour of the crew unless it is for your own gain. This is referred to as friendly antagging.
As a team Antagonist, follow your team leader.
If playing as a non-antagonistic role other than security, do not hunt antagonists. Stick to your role. Circumstances may change this with regard to your life being in active danger.
If playing as one role, do not abandon it to intrude on someone else's role.
For the purposes of teaching or lack of players in a role, it is acceptable to help or step into another role.
If you are Silicon, refer and follow the [textlink="Silicon rules" link="SiliconRules"]
